findings.title: SSH root login enabled with password authentication
findings.description: PermitRootLogin is set to 'yes' and PasswordAuthentication is 'yes' in sshd_config. Combined with SSH listening on default port 22 on all interfaces, this creates an active brute-force attack surface.

findings.title: 52 pending security updates including kernel CVEs
findings.description: apt list --upgradable shows 52 packages with security updates pending. Includes linux-image with 3 known CVEs (privilege escalation). unattended-upgrades is not installed.

findings.title: No OOM protection on production server
findings.description: Neither earlyoom nor systemd-oomd is installed or configured. Server has 32GB RAM with no swap. Under memory pressure, the kernel OOM killer will terminate processes unpredictably.

parked.title: 3 zombie processes under nginx
parked.description: 3 zombie processes parented by nginx worker PIDs
parked.reason_parked: WEAK signal from single model (sonnet only), not reinforced by evaluator

parked.title: Node.js process at sustained 45% CPU
parked.description: PID 8821 running node at 45% CPU — may be normal workload
parked.reason_parked: WEAK signal from single model, likely normal application behavior
